creator: arun@sharmas.dhs.org
text:
Missing symlink to libqtcmodule.so

Fix: 

------------=_1000070235-4083-0----gtcantaubYubPY3R60BWwchLFzfqmAn8HFScQPBtSDHPFn58
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -u pkg-plist- pkg-plist
--- pkg-plist-  Sun Sep  9 14:07:15 2001
+++ pkg-plist   Sun Sep  9 11:45:18 2001
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 bin/pyuic
 bin/eric
 lib/%%PYTHON_VERSION%%/site-packages/libqtcmodule-2.4.so
+lib/%%PYTHON_VERSION%%/site-packages/libqtcmodule.so
 lib/%%PYTHON_VERSION%%/site-packages/libqtcmodule.la
 lib/%%PYTHON_VERSION%%/site-packages/libqtcmodule.a
 lib/%%PYTHON_VERSION%%/site-packages/qt.py
How-To-Repeat: Use py-qt port in 4.4
